hero.title: About DataLead
hero.subtitle: 25+ years of enterprise data resilience and AI-ready platform expertise.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text1: DataLead Consulting is an enterprise data resilience partner for mission-critical environments. We design and operate secure, high-availability, and rapid-response data platforms for organizations where downtime is not an option.
mission.text2: Today we serve government agencies, financial institutions, telecom, and large-scale digital enterprises across Azerbaijan — from 24/7 mission-critical database operations to AI-ready Data Lakehouse platforms powered by IOMETE. We manage 1,700+ databases, 8 PB+ of enterprise data, with a proven 99.98% uptime record.
mission.quote: Turn your data into investment instantly — that's not just our tagline, it's our promise.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: The principles that guide everything we do.

expertise.title: Deep Expertise
expertise.desc: Certified professionals with 25+ years of hands-on experience across Oracle, PostgreSQL, IOMETE, Apache Spark, and modern data platforms.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: Pioneering AI-ready Data Lakehouse architectures, Apache Iceberg integration, and next-generation data platforms for the machine-driven era.

quality.title: Enterprise Resilience
quality.desc: Six pillars of resilience — Prevention, Protection, Preparedness, Response, Recovery, Governance — built into every engagement.

partnership.title: True Partnership
partnership.desc: We work alongside our customers as trusted advisors, delivering enterprise data continuity — not isolated IT services.

timeline.title: Our Journey
timeline.subtitle: Key milestones in our growth story.

y1.title: Team Origins
y1.desc: Our founding experts began managing enterprise databases in mission-critical government and banking environments.

y2.title: Government Partnerships
y2.desc: Became a trusted partner for Azerbaijan's government agencies including Tax Service, Customs Committee, and ministries.

y3.title: Open Source & Big Data
y3.desc: Expanded into PostgreSQL, NoSQL, Big Data ecosystems with Cloudera, Apache Spark, and Cassandra.

y4.title: AI-Era Platforms
y4.desc: Became official IOMETE partner, delivering Data Lakehouse platforms for AI, advanced analytics, and enterprise data resilience.
